file_name: EMERALDHEALTHTHERAPEUTICSINC_06_10_2020-EX-4.5-CONSULTING AGREEMENT - DR. GAETANO MORELLO N.D. INC..txt

perturbation.original_text: For the purposes of this definition, the term "control" when used with respect to any person or entity means the power to direct the management and policies of such person or entity, directly or indirectly, whether as an officer or director, through the ownership of voting securities, by contract or otherwise.
perturbation.changed_text: For the purposes of this definition, the term "control" when used with respect to any person or entity means the ability to significantly influence the management and policies of such person or entity, whether directly or indirectly, through any business relationship, family connection, or otherwise.
perturbation.explanation: This change alters the definition of 'control' within the definition of 'Affiliate' in Schedule A. Originally, 'control' was tied to the power to direct management, implying a more formal and legally defensible connection (ownership of voting securities, contract). The modified definition broadens 'control' to include 'significantly influence' through 'any business relationship, family connection, or otherwise.' This contradicts the intention of the original agreement, which relied on a stricter definition of control for determining Affiliate status. This could lead to disputes regarding which entities qualify as affiliates and are therefore subject to the agreement's terms.
perturbation.contradicted_text: (a) "Affiliate" means any person or entity controlled by, controlling or under common control with the Company. For the purposes of this definition, the term "control" when used with respect to any person or entity means the ability to significantly influence the management and policies of such person or entity, whether directly or indirectly, through any business relationship, family connection, or otherwise.
perturbation.justification: The changed text broadens the definition of 'control' to 'significantly influence' through 'any business relationship, family connection, or otherwise.' This directly contradicts the definition used in the 'Contradicted Text,' which uses the same expanded definition. While superficially identical, the change from the original text's more restrictive definition to the expanded definition creates an in-text contradiction because the original agreement relied on a stricter definition. The changed text introduces the contradiction where one did not exist before, rendering the definition of 'Affiliate' ambiguous and potentially unenforceable, fitting the definition of 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction'.

perturbation.original_text: The Contractor may terminate this Agreement and his or her engagement for any reason at any time upon providing 30 days advance notice in writing to Emerald. Termination will be effective, at Emeralds' election, on a date which is no earlier than the date such notice is received and no later than the date which is 30 days following that date.
perturbation.changed_text: The Contractor may terminate this Agreement and his or her engagement for any reason at any time upon providing 30 days advance notice in writing to Emerald. Termination will be effective immediately upon receipt of such notice.
perturbation.explanation: This change causes an in-text contradiction by stating that termination is effective 'immediately upon receipt of such notice', which contradicts the prior clause stating it will take place 'no later than the date which is 30 days following that date.' This creates ambiguity and uncertainty about when the contract termination is actually effective, creating potential for disputes over obligations during the 30-day window in the original agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Contractor's Right to Terminate Agreement for any Reason. The Contractor may terminate this Agreement and his or her engagement for any reason at any time upon providing 30 days advance notice in writing to Emerald. Termination will be effective immediately upon receipt of such notice.
perturbation.justification: The changed text states that termination is effective immediately upon receipt of notice. The contradicted text includes the original language, 'Contractor may terminate...upon providing 30 days advance notice' as well as the changed language stating the termination is effective immediately. This is a direct contradiction. The change makes the contract internally inconsistent as it now contains two conflicting statements regarding the effective date of termination, leading to uncertainty and potential disputes.
